name: Suitcase Carry
image_match: Farmers Walk (closest match — suitcase carry is the single-arm variant; image shows two-DB version)
form_cues: Don't lean toward the load — stay tall
notes: Anti-lateral flexion + grip + obliques. Time-based, not rep-based — target_reps stores seconds per side.
video_id_query: Suitcase Carry how to proper form
instructions: Hold a single dumbbell in one hand at your side. The other hand stays empty.
Stand tall, brace your core, pull shoulder blades down and back.
Walk slowly forward without leaning — the loaded side wants to pull you over; resist it.
Walk for the prescribed time, then switch sides.
